_meta.what: Store-patrol target registry (campaign 2, SCS-REQ orchestrator-sdk §8). Adding a storefront = adding one entry here — zero new code as long as an extractor for its `extract` kind exists in store-patrol.mjs. Both current targets are official public Steam JSON endpoints; the appreviews endpoint is already consumed by the news layer (aggregator_collectors.py), so this adds no new ToS surface.
_meta.archive: Public-Info-Pool/Record/store-patrol/{target-id}/ — latest.json (current signature) + {date}.json (daily snapshot) + changes.jsonl (append-only change log)
